query:
SELECT poNumber, vendorName, batchNo, serialNumber, imei, productName, currentStatus, archivedAt, createdAt
FROM products
WHERE poNumber IN (
  'TEST-A1-IMEI-1778749381829',
  'PO-20260514-04',
  'PO-STOCK-BLOCK-1778749390586',
  'PO-BACKUP-EDGE-1778749392638',
  'PO-20260514-05',
  'PO-20260514-07',
  'PO-20260514-12',
  'TEST-A1-DUP-GUARD-1778749412041',
  'TEST-A1-NAME-1778749416728',
  'TEST-A1-SN-1778749418491'
)
ORDER BY createdAt ASC, poNumber ASC;
